MODULE: cosmos.core.llm_backend
FILE: cosmos/core/llm_backend.py (1830 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos LLM Backend

Novel Approaches:
1. Cascade Inference - Start with fast model, auto-escalate on low confidence
2. Adaptive Temperature - Dynamic temperature based on task entropy
3. Context-Aware Routing - Route to specialized backends based on content analysis
4. Streaming Confidence Estimatio

CLASSES:
- BackendType(Enum)
- GenerationConfig: Configuration for text generation with adaptive parameters.
- GenerationResult: Result from LLM generation with metadata.
- StreamChunk: Streaming chunk with real-time quality estimation.
- ConfidenceEstimator: Novel: Real-time confidence estimation during generation.

Uses multiple heurist
  Methods: def update(self, token: str, logprob: Optional[float]=None) -> float
  Methods: def reset(self)
- AdaptiveTemperature: Novel: Dynamic temperature adaptation based on generation context.

- Increases 
  Methods: def adapt(self, confidence: float, content_type: str='general') -> float
  Methods: def detect_content_type(self, text: str) -> str
- LLMBackend(ABC): Abstract base class for LLM backends.
  Methods: def backend_type(self) -> BackendType
  Methods: async def load(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def unload(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> GenerationResult
  Methods: async def generate_stream(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> AsyncIterat
  Methods: async def get_embedding(self, text: str) -> list[float]
  Methods: def is_loaded(self) -> bool
  Methods: def estimate_complexity(self, prompt: str) -> float
- OllamaBackend(LLMBackend): Ollama backend with enhanced features:
- Connection pooling for concurrent reque
  Methods: def backend_type(self) -> BackendType
  Methods: async def load(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def unload(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> GenerationResult
  Methods: async def generate_stream(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> AsyncIterat
  Methods: async def get_embedding(self, text: str) -> list[float]
- LlamaCppBackend(LLMBackend): llama.cpp backend with advanced features:
- GPU layer offloading optimization
- 
  Methods: def backend_type(self) -> BackendType
  Methods: async def load(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def unload(self) -> bool
  Methods: async def generate(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> GenerationResult
  Methods: async def generate_stream(self, prompt: str, config: Optional[GenerationConfig]=None) -> AsyncIterat
  Methods: async def get_embedding(self, text: str) -> list[float]
- BitNetBackend(LLMBackend): BitNet backend for ultra-efficient CPU inference.

Novel: Hybrid quantization sw

  Methods: async def load(self) -> bool
